serviceDescription: Amazon DynamoDB is a key-value and document database that delivers single-digit millisecond performance at any scale. It's a fully managed, multiregion, multimaster, durable database with built-in security, backup and restore, and in-memory caching for internet-scale applications.

helpText.aws: Amazon DynamoDB global tables is a fully managed, serverless, multi-Region, and multi-active database. Global tables provide you 99.999% availability, increased application resiliency, and improved business continuity. As global tables replicate your Amazon DynamoDB tables automatically across your choice of AWS Regions, you can achieve fast, local read and write performance.
helpText.aws-iso: Amazon DynamoDB global tables is a fully managed, serverless, multi-Region, and multi-active database. Global tables provide you 99.999% availability, increased application resiliency, and improved business continuity. As global tables replicate your Amazon DynamoDB tables automatically across your choice of AWS Regions, you can achieve fast, local read and write performance.

content.aws: Amazon DynamoDB global tables offers a variety of configuration options to meet your multi-Region replication needs. For more information on DynamoDB global tables pricing, please see the DynamoDB pricing page .
